Risk Statement: Privileged account misuse due to excessive standing access and weak periodic review
Existing Controls: MFA for admins; quarterly manual access review
Mitigation Strategy: Implement PAM with just-in-time access and monthly automated access recertification

Risk Statement: Ransomware infection from unmanaged endpoints and delayed patching
Existing Controls: EDR on managed endpoints; baseline hardening
Mitigation Strategy: Expand asset inventory coverage to 100% and enforce 14-day critical patch SLA

Risk Statement: Lateral movement risk due to flat internal network segments
Mitigation Strategy: Design and implement micro-segmentation for critical systems and admin networks

Risk Statement: Production vulnerabilities introduced from inconsistent SAST/DAST use in CI/CD
Existing Controls: Peer review and manual security testing for major releases
Mitigation Strategy: Enforce SAST on pull requests and DAST before release gates

Risk Statement: Hard-coded API keys and credentials in source repositories
Existing Controls: Repository scanning enabled for public repos
Mitigation Strategy: Migrate secrets to vault and block secrets in commits via pre-receive hooks

Risk Statement: Insufficient centralized logs for critical application events and admin actions
Existing Controls: Local app logs retained for 14 days
Mitigation Strategy: Forward security-relevant logs to SIEM with 365-day retention and alerting

Risk Statement: Sensitive data exposure due to inconsistent classification and handling practices
Existing Controls: Ad hoc labeling by data owners
Mitigation Strategy: Implement enterprise data classification policy and automated labeling controls

Risk Statement: Legacy data stores not using encryption at rest
Existing Controls: TLS enforced in transit for all production services
Mitigation Strategy: Enable encryption at rest for legacy databases and rotate encryption keys

Risk Statement: Backup restores are untested creating recovery uncertainty during incidents
Mitigation Strategy: Run quarterly restore drills and document RTO/RPO validation evidence

Risk Statement: Third-party SaaS vendors lack formal periodic security reassessment
Mitigation Strategy: Establish annual vendor risk review with SOC reports and remediation tracking
